steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content: In the function $t(x)=-4x+72$, the coefficient of $x$ is $-4$. This coefficient is the rate of change.

steps.title: Interpret the rate
steps.content: The input $x$ is hours after $6$ p.m., so a slope of $-4$ means the estimated temperature changes by $-4$ degrees Fahrenheit per hour. In context, it decreases $4$ degrees Fahrenheit each hour. The answer is A.
